list.title: My Accounts
list.emptyMessage: Create your first account to get started!
list.errorAuth: You need to be logged in to view accounts. Please refresh the page and log in again.
list.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
list.deleteBlockedHint: If this account still has expenses, incomes, or savings goals attached, deletion may be blocked until you remove them.

form.name: Account Name
form.familyMembersHelp: Family accounts require at least one member. You can add more members later.
form.familyMembersError: Family account requires at least one member

actions.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete account "{{name}}"? This will delete all associated data.

delete.errorFallback: Check whether the account still has associated data and try again.
delete.blockedTitle: This account can't be deleted yet
delete.blockedDescription: This account still has associated data.

tooltips.accountName: Give it a name that helps you identify it easily. For example: 'My Finances', 'Household Expenses', 'Savings'.
tooltips.accountType: Personal: Just for you. Family: To share expenses with your family and see who spent what.
tooltips.currency: The main currency for this account. You can record expenses in other currencies, but they'll be converted to this one for totals.
tooltips.familyMembers: Add your family members to assign expenses and income to them. This way you know who spent or received what.
